Local Server

Server root
Port

Set Up Panoptikon

Choose the folders and indexing options for your first database.

File opening

Choose how Panoptikon opens files on this computer. Use {path}, {folder}, and {filename} in arguments. Leave every field empty for the system default.

Relay

Relay lets a Panoptikon page open indexed files on this computer—for example when Panoptikon runs on a NAS and the same folders are mounted here. It only listens on loopback; each Panoptikon endpoint requires approval below.

Commands on this computer

Pairing requests

Paired Panoptikon endpoints and folder mappings
